steps.title: Parallel lines have equal slope
steps.content: Shortcut (par/perp): Parallel lines share the same slope. The line $y = 42x + 6$ has slope 42. Since line $s$ is parallel, it also has slope 42.

steps.title: Write the equation through the origin and evaluate
steps.content: Line $s$ passes through $(0, 0)$, so its equation is $y = 42x$. At $x = 4$: $d = 42 \times 4 = 168$. The answer is 168.
